title: CVE-2026-3670 - Freedom Factory dGEN1 com.dgen.alarm improper authorization

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 — CVE-2026-3670 - Freedom Factory dGEN1 com.dgen.alarm imprope
